item.title: Amazon Bedrock adds model availability for Nova Premier
item.description: Amazon Bedrock customers can access new model availability in supported regions.

item.title: Gemma 4 models now available on Amazon Bedrock
item.description: Gemma 4 31B, Gemma 4 26B-A4B, and Gemma 4 E2B are available on Amazon Bedrock with reasoning, multimodal input, function calling, streaming, and improved price performance.
